title: UP DELEd BTC 2018, 2021, 2023, 2024 Result 2026 | First and Third Semester
description: UP BTC DELEd Semester Result 2026 Post Update Date: 26/02/2026 Short Details: UP DELEd Result 2026: Examination Regulatory Authority, Prayagraj Uttar Pradesh UP BTC Result 2025 has been released on the website @https://btcexam.in/ for UP DELEd 2026 Examination . The candidates who appeared in the exam and were waiting for their result, their wait is over and the result has been Declared. Get the direct link to download the UP DELEd Result 2026 Official Website.More Other Recruitment | Jobs On...
